blurb_en:
Beijing's Moonshot AI shipped Kimi K3 on Thursday — 2.8 trillion parameters, a 1-million-token context window, and full model weights announced free to download on July 27.
• At 2.8T total parameters, Kimi K3 is now the largest open-weight model in the world, ahead of Meta Llama, Alibaba Qwen, and Mistral.
• In blind Arena testing, developers preferred Kimi K3 over GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5 for front-end coding tasks. Moonshot says it still trails on general reasoning — rare corporate candor.
• API pricing: $3 per million input tokens, $15 output — roughly half the per-task cost of Anthropic Opus 4.8.
• The model was reportedly built on Huawei chips, not Nvidia, making it the first frontier-class open-weight model to demonstrate the US export control gap hasn't closed.
• Backed by Alibaba and Meituan, Moonshot was valued at $20B this year; K3's Elo jumped 732 points from K2.6 — the largest single-generation leap on the Artificial Analysis leaderboard.
• For Insta360 teams evaluating AI infrastructure: there is now a frontier-class Chinese alternative at half the price, with no export control compliance headaches.
blurb_zh:
月之暗面（Moonshot AI）周四发布了Kimi K3——2.8万亿参数，全球最大开源模型，7月27日向所有人开放权重。
• 在Arena盲测中，开发者对前端编程任务的偏好超过了GPT-5.6 Sol和Fable 5。月之暗面自己也说K3通用任务上仍落后——这种坦诚很少见。
• API定价：每百万输入token 3美元，输出15美元，约为Anthropic Opus 4.8同等任务成本的一半。
• 据报道，模型在华为芯片上训练，不依赖英伟达——这是美出口管制未能完全封堵差距的直接证明。
• Elo分数1547，较上一代K2.6提升732分，是Artificial Analysis排行榜有史以来单代最大跨越。
• 对国内评估AI基础设施的团队：现在有了旗舰级中国替代方案，价格便宜一半，也没有出口管制合规麻烦。
verification_notes: Confirmed via VentureBeat, CNBC (July 17), Axios (July 16), Fortune (July 16), Tom's Hardware (July 17), SiliconAngle (July 16). 6+ independent outlets confirm model release. Benchmark claims (Fable 5 Arena comparison) from Tom's Hardware citing Artificial Analysis leaderboard.

blurb_en:
After two years of regulatory review and a deal with Alibaba and Baidu, Apple Intelligence is officially approved for mainland China — just not running on Apple's own models.
• The Cyberspace Administration of China added Apple to its approved generative AI registry on July 15; Alibaba's Qwen AI and Baidu will supply the on-device models.
• No launch date announced. CAC approval clears the legal hurdle; it doesn't schedule the rollout.
• Greater China contributed $20.5 billion to Apple's revenue last quarter, up 28 percent — which probably explains why two years felt worth it.
• The practical implication: iPhone AI camera features in China — Photo Editing, Visual Intelligence, Memories — will run on domestic models, not the global Apple Intelligence stack.
• Alibaba and Baidu shares both rose on the news.
• For Insta360's creative teams shooting on iPhone in China: AI editing tools on your phone may behave differently from the international version of the same feature.
blurb_zh:
两年审批，两家本土合作伙伴。Apple Intelligence终于拿到了大陆的入场券——但跑在手机里的，是阿里的通义千问和百度的模型，不是苹果自己的。
• 网信办7月15日正式批准苹果进入大陆生成式AI服务目录。
• 暂无上市时间表：拿到批文是通关，不是开关。
• 大中华区上季度营收205亿美元，同比增长28%——大概解释了为什么等两年也值得。
• 讽刺之处：苹果谈判两年拿到了在中国卖AI手机的资格，背后的模型却由中国政府认可的厂商控制。
• 阿里巴巴和百度股价当天双双上涨。
• 对在中国用iPhone工作的Insta360团队：AI相机功能将运行本土模型，和国际版体验可能不一样。
verification_notes: Bloomberg primary reporting (July 15), TechCrunch confirms independently (July 16). Multiple secondary sources confirm CAC registry addition. Revenue figures from Apple earnings.

blurb_en:
Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro has now missed three consecutive self-imposed launch deadlines, and Bloomberg reports the rebuilt model still can't match GPT-5.6 in coding benchmarks.
• Sundar Pichai promised developers at I/O on May 19: give us until next month. That month became two, and July 17 came and went.
• The specific issues, per Bloomberg: frequent hallucinations, inconsistent outputs, and failure to clear internal coding benchmarks — the capability Google said would set the model apart.
• Google has registered model names including Gemini 3.6 Flash and Gemini 3.5 Flash Light, suggesting a smaller stopgap release is being prepared.
• Bloomberg's sources include frustrated Google engineers and researchers who worry the company is losing an edge to Anthropic and OpenAI — an unusually candid internal leak.
• The same week, China's Kimi K3 launched at 2.8 trillion parameters, beat Fable 5 in front-end coding Arena rankings, and announced free model weights. No self-imposed deadlines were missed.
• For teams building on Gemini: still no 3.5 Pro API. ETA: unknown.
blurb_zh:
谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro三次错过自己定下的发布节点。彭博社7月16日确认：重构后的模型仍无法通过内部编程基准测试。
• 5月19日I/O大会上，皮查伊对开发者说：再给我们一个月。一个月变成两个月，7月17日来了又走了。
• 具体问题：幻觉频发、输出不稳定，编程能力仍跟不上GPT-5.6。
• 谷歌已注册Gemini 3.6 Flash和Gemini 3.5 Flash Light两个型号——看来在准备备用方案。
• 彭博社消息源称谷歌内部工程师和研究人员感到沮丧，担心公司正在失去优势——在谷歌，这种表态很罕见。
• 同一周，中国Kimi K3发布，2.8万亿参数，前端编程竞技场超越Fable 5，权重免费开放。没有一次跳票。
• 还在等Gemini 3.5 Pro API的团队：还在等。时间未定。
verification_notes: Bloomberg primary source (July 16). Confirmed by TechTimes (July 16), 9to5Google (July 16), SeekingAlpha, Yahoo Finance. All confirm third consecutive missed deadline and stopgap Flash model plans.

blurb_en:
Patreon graduated from politely requesting AI crawlers not to scrape its content to actively blocking them at the network level through a Cloudflare partnership.
• Previously, Patreon used robots.txt — an honor system AI companies are widely accused of ignoring. Cloudflare now blocks known training crawlers across every post on the platform.
• CEO Jack Conte's three demands to AI companies: consent, credit, and compensation. He got none of the three, so he locked the door.
• Search indexing bots still get through — Patreon wants to be findable, just not trainable.
• Cloudflare also changed its own default policy: crawlers that both index and train on ad-supported pages are now blocked by default.
• PetaPixel and 404 Media both covered the story — the visual-creator community is paying attention, since Patreon is one of the primary income platforms for photographers and filmmakers.
• For creators publishing on Patreon: your content just got harder to vacuum into an AI training dataset. For teams building AI image models: your publicly accessible training data source got a bit smaller.
blurb_zh:
Patreon宣布升级——从礼貌请求变为主动封堵，通过Cloudflare在网络层直接屏蔽AI训练爬虫。
• 此前依赖robots.txt——一套AI公司普遍被指无视的君子协定。现在Cloudflare直接拦截已知训练爬虫。
• CEO Jack Conte提出三项要求：授权、署名、补偿。一项都没拿到，所以他选择了关门。
• 搜索索引机器人仍可通过——Patreon想被搜到，只是不想被拿去训练。
• Cloudflare同步修改了默认政策：在投放广告的页面上，兼做索引和训练的爬虫现在默认被拦截。
• PetaPixel和404 Media均作了报道——摄影师和影像创作者社区正在关注，Patreon是他们最主要的收入平台之一。
• 对在Patreon发布作品的创作者：你的内容被吸入AI训练集的难度刚刚增加了。
verification_notes: TechCrunch (July 17), PetaPixel (July 13, first coverage), 404 Media, MediaPost (July 13). All confirm Cloudflare partnership and network-level blocking. CEO Jack Conte quotes confirmed across multiple outlets.
